---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Maestro CLI
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way today? Describe the
use case rather than a specific implementation.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. If it touches the plan schema, the CLI, or a
specific engine, say so.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you have tried or thought about.

## Scope

- Does this require a new plan-schema field, CLI flag, or subcommand?
- Any backward-compatibility concerns with the frozen v1 contract
  (see docs/V1_API_FREEZE.md)?
- Rough sense of size (small tweak vs. larger feature)?
